name: kanban
description: Kanban's tracked Codex workflows: solve, pr-review, pr-rereview, and pr-revise.

interface.shortDescription: Kanban's solve, pr-review, pr-rereview, and pr-revise workflows
interface.longDescription: Packages the Codex-side workflows the Kanban board invokes by name: $solve claims and implements a GitHub issue through PR creation, $pr-review and $pr-rereview run the canonical opposite-brand pull request review, and $pr-revise repairs a changes-requested pull request and hands off to a fresh canonical rereview. Each workflow preserves Kanban's existing solver, reviewer, and revision authority boundaries described in docs/agent-workflow-contract.md.
defaultPrompt: Use $solve to claim GitHub issue #123, implement it in an isolated worktree, and open a tested PR.
Use $pr-review to review pull request #38 through the canonical opposite-brand workflow.
Use $pr-rereview to rereview pull request #38 after its author pushes changes.
Use $pr-revise to address the canonical changes-requested review on PR #38.
